👥 Increase social engagement: join a study group, attend campus events, or schedule time with friends.
📋 Combat procrastination: break tasks into smaller chunks, use time-blocking, set earlier personal deadlines.
💭 Emotional wellbeing: journal your thoughts, practice gratitude, or talk to a trusted person.
